file: 955_Manal 等 - 2023 - Design of a bifunctional catalyst by alloying Ni with Ru-supported H-beta for selective hydrodeoxyge.txt

experiments.description: 在150°C、3.0 MPa氢气压力下，使用1Ru0.5Ni/H-Beta双功能催化剂，对双酚A（BPA）进行液相加氢脱氧（HDO）反应1小时，将其转化为喷气燃料范围的C15环烷烃（丙烷-2,2-二基二环己烷，P7），实现了99.9%的转化率和97.3%的P7选择性。
experiments.text_snippet: The hydrodeoxygenation of the polycarbonate model compounds (Bisphenol A)... was carried out in a stainless-steel high-pressure Parr reactor... afforded a complete conversion and >90% selectivity of propane-2,2-diyldicyclohexane (P7)... The catalytic hydrodeoxygenation of BPA... was investigated at 150◦C, 3.0MPaH2 gas for 1h using monometallic and bimetallic supported H-Beta catalysts.

experiments.description: 在180°C、3.0 MPa氢气压力下，使用1Ru0.5Ni/H-Beta双功能催化剂，对聚碳酸酯（PC）塑料废物进行液相加氢脱氧（HDO）反应10小时，将其转化为喷气燃料范围的C15环烷烃（丙烷-2,2-二基二环己烷，P7），实现了99.9%的转化率和90.2%的P7选择性。该过程还放大到了2克塑料废物规模。
experiments.text_snippet: The hydrodeoxygenation of... polycarbonate waste was carried out in a stainless-steel high-pressure Parr reactor... The process was scaled to 2 g of plastic waste... afforded a complete conversion and >90% selectivity of propane-2,2-diyldicyclohexane (P7)... The catalytic process was scaled up to 2g of PC waste. In this case, ~90% PC conversion and ~89% P7 selectivity were achieved.

Catalyst composition.value: Ru-Ni alloy supported on H-Beta zeolite
Catalyst composition.original: Ru-Ni alloy supported on H-Beta zeolite

Catalyst stability.value: Excellent reusability for five catalytic runs
Catalyst stability.original: Excellent reusability for five catalytic runs

Catalyst stability.original: Excellent reusability with minor activity decrease after 5 cycles
